result: If I could change the world in one way, I would foster deeper understanding and empathy among people. With true understanding, individuals and communities could bridge divides, resolve conflicts peacefully, and collaborate more effectively to solve the complex challenges we all face. Empathy nurtures respect, compassion, and curiosity—qualities that make a better world possible.
